Interface UpdateableOperator

All Superinterfaces:
Named, Operator, ParsableVariable, Sorted, SortedOperator, SyntaxElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
LocationVariable, ProgramSV
public interface UpdateableOperator extends ParsableVariable
Operators implementing this interface may stand for locations as well. This means e.g. occur as top level operators on the left side of an assignment pair of an update.
